Slide 1 — Hook

6 trips in your camera roll. Zero blogs written.

Slide 2 — Transition
You remember them. Barely.

Slide 3 — Trip #1
Trip #1. Bali.
The one that changed something. Still untitled in your photos.
Bloggo
Slide 4 — Trip #2
Trip #2. The solo one.
You were going to write about it. You never did.

Slide 5 — Trip #3
Trip #3. The one with people
you don't see anymore. No caption. No context.
Bloggo
Slide 6 — Trip #4
Trip #4. Something went wrong.
In the best possible way. You never told the story.
Bloggo
Slide 7 — Trip #5
Trip #5. The best meal of your life.
The restaurant has no name in your camera roll.
Bloggo
Slide 8 — Trip #6
Trip #6. The one you keep
meaning to document. Still waiting.
Bloggo
Slide 9 — Insight (Save-Worthy)
Trips don't fade.
The details do.
One by one.
